components.value: S the spell already requires, and doesn’t replace the somatic component. The target’s spell-like abilities require this emotion component, even though they normally don’t need spell . As usual with emotion , the target can’t cast spells (or use spell-like abilities , in this case) while affected by a non-harmless emotion or fear effect. description.value: You create an emotional block in the target’s mind, adding an emotion component to each spell or spell-like ability he uses. This is in addition to any other
